title: calyptrion hybanthus
intro: Calyptrion hybanthus, also known as Yellow Wood, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calyptrion hybanthus include its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a remedy for skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Calyptrion hybanthus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas and ointments for topical application.
